dice_guide.title: How to Dice
dice_guide.subtitle: How to Cuztomize the Dice
dice_guide.description: This window allows you to customize your dice's abilities to match your playstyle. Here are the details:

description.dice_name: Displayed at the top to indicate which dice set you are currently customizing (e.g., Dice A).
description.custom_area: Displays a mock-up dice and the slots for inserting dice faces.
description.axis_face: The square slots located at the top and bottom of the dice.
description.fill_face: The gray slots on the left and right sides of the dice (2 on each side).
description.library: A panel showing the available dice faces you can select. (The list will update based on the type of slot selected).

buttons.clear: Removes all dice faces from every slot.
buttons.save: Confirms and applies your current configuration.

steps.title: Customization Steps
steps.step1: Select a Slot: Click on any empty slot around the dice (Base or Customizable Faces). Once selected, a white border will appear to indicate the active status.
steps.step2: Select a Dice Face: Click on your desired dice face from the library on the right to insert it into the selected slot.
steps.step3: Edit / Remove: * If you want to change a dice face, simply click on a new face from the right panel.
steps.step3_1: If you want to remove a dice face from a specific slot, click the cross (x) button at the top right corner of that slot.
steps.step4: Confirm Settings: Once you have finished arranging the dice faces, click the "Save" button to apply them.

help_modal.title: How Calculation works
help_modal.subtitle: How Dice probability of plakoro works
help_modal.overview: This tool <yellow>simulates and calculates the probability (%)</yellow> of your dice faces matching the elemental requirements of your selected skill cards. It allows you to strategically customize your dice sets for maximum efficiency before entering a real match.
help_modal.step1:
Step 1: Select Your Pokémon
Click on the displayed Pokémon icon to change your character. *(Each Pokémon has its own pool of dice faces and skill cards).*
help_modal.step2:
Step 2: Select the Desired Skill Cards
Select 5 skill cards to be used in actual gameplay to determine the percentage probability of successfully activating each skill.
help_modal.step3:
Step 3: Customize Your Dice
You have 3 dice (6 faces each). They have "Base Faces" and "Customizable Faces". Put your elements on these faces to match your plan.
help_modal.step4:
Step 4: Click Calculate
Press the Calculate button to start the rolling simulation. The system will process and display your probability rates instantly.
help_modal.note_dice_limit_desc: Custom chips are limited. If you put element chips in Dice A, you will have fewer chips left for Dice B and Dice C.
help_modal.note_pkg_title: Dice Pool Depends on Pokémon Set
help_modal.note_pkg_desc: The available pool of dice faces varies according to each Pokémon's package set.
help_modal.note_percent_desc: The displayed percentage represents the efficiency of your current dice setup. It shows a <yellow>...%</yellow> chance of successfully rolling the exact elemental combination needed to activate that specific skill, based on all possible combinations simulated.
